title: Prism Evidence Bundle v1
description: Canonical, pseudonymous evidence bundle signed into every glass-box credential. Serialization for hashing: recursively key-sorted JSON with no whitespace (see server/lib/credentials.js canonicalStringify). The signature is Ed25519 over the SHA-256 of that canonical form. Claim supported: 'cryptographically verifiable evidence chain' — nothing stronger.

candidateId.description: Pseudonymous candidate id. The bundle NEVER carries name/email/identity fields (enforced at issuance).

calibrationRunId.description: Frozen calibration run applied; null until the first equating run exists.

isSynthetic.description: true for dummy/dev/test sessions — such credentials are demos, never certificates.

language.description: Assessment language code (en, hi-en, hi, ta).

scoringStatus.description: Non-English scoring stays provisional until the multilingual DIF study reports — rubric translation is not rubric equivalence.

weights.description: Exact server weights at issuance (sum to 1).

reliability.description: Judge-panel agreement record (method, label, agreement, panel, positionSwapDelta, flaggedForReview).

confidenceInterval.description: Conformal CI when the dual scorer produced one; null otherwise. Never fabricated.

evidence.description: Per-dimension transcript quotes. Disclosure-gated at the API (candidate's share token); always inside the signed bundle.

judgeVotes.description: Per-vote judge records with model ids (dual scorer only).

integrityEvents.description: Counts per proctoring event type; never raw payloads.

review.description: Human-review state. Detection/integrity signals are ADVISORY ONLY: they may route a session to human review; they never auto-fail a candidate. There is no machine verdict vocabulary.

version.description: Consent copy version the candidate accepted.

promptVersions.description: Versioned prompt files governing scoring at issuance.

flagsActive.description: PRISM_* feature flags at issuance (secret-named keys excluded).

judgeDeployment.description: Azure OpenAI deployment name used by the judge panel.
